title: Ping Wheel-Plugin
description: A Bukkit plugin that acts as a translation layer for the mod "Ping Wheel".
body:
About
------------------
  
This plugin provides functionality for users who prefer to play on Bukkit servers with plugins designed for the Bukkit API, rather than limiting themselves to Fabric mod servers. In order for users to enjoy this translation layer, [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel "Ping Wheel") must still be installed on a Fabric instance.



Ping Wheel
------------------
  
Modern co-op games often allow players to communicate via "pings" to mark in-game locations.  
[Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel "Ping Wheel") provides such pinging mechanism for the fabric mod loader.



Association
------------------
  
This plugin is an official part of the Ping Wheel experience and will be updated along with it.
